Read All Posts

Building in Public

Why I share my work openly

I believe in learning by doing and sharing the journey—wins, failures, and everything in between. This site is where I document my experiments in digital marketing, programmatic SEO, and various side projects.

Whether you're here to learn from my experiences or just curious about what I'm building, welcome! Feel free to reach out if you have questions or want to collaborate.
